import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Extract local grid patch observation for navigation task."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position and direction
    agent_pos = state.agent.position
    agent_y, agent_x = agent_pos[0], agent_pos[1]
    
    # Agent direction (one-hot encoded)
    agent_dir_onehot = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4, dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    # Extract 3x3 local patch around agent (normalized tile IDs)
    patch_size = 3
    patch_tiles = []
    
    for dy in range(-1, 2):  # -1, 0, 1
        for dx in range(-1, 2):  # -1, 0, 1
            y = jnp.clip(agent_y + dy, 0, H - 1)
            x = jnp.clip(agent_x + dx, 0, W - 1)
            tile_id = state.grid[y, x, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
            # Normalize tile ID (FLOOR=1, WALL=2, GOAL=6, etc.)
            norm_tile = tile_id / 12.0  # Max tile ID is 12
            patch_tiles.append(norm_tile)
    
    patch_obs = jnp.array(patch_tiles)
    
    # Find goal position for relative direction
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    
    # Relative direction to goal (normalized)
    rel_y = (goal_y - agent_y.astype(jnp.float32)) / (H - 1)
    rel_x = (goal_x - agent_x.astype(jnp.float32)) / (W - 1)
    
    # Manhattan distance to goal (normalized)
    manhattan_dist = jnp.abs(goal_y - agent_y.astype(jnp.float32)) + jnp.abs(goal_x - agent_x.astype(jnp.float32))
    max_manhattan = (H - 1) + (W - 1)
    norm_manhattan = manhattan_dist / max_manhattan
    
    # Concatenate all features
    observation = jnp.concatenate([
        patch_obs,                                # Local 3x3 patch (9)
        agent_dir_onehot,                        # Agent direction (4)
        jnp.array([rel_y, rel_x]),              # Relative goal direction (2)
        jnp.array([norm_manhattan])             # Manhattan distance to goal (1)
    ])
    
    return observation.astype(jnp.float32)

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Compute reward using Manhattan distance shaping."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    
    # Calculate Manhattan distances
    curr_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    curr_manhattan = jnp.abs(curr_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(curr_pos[1] - goal_x)
    next_manhattan = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - goal_x)
    
    # Distance improvement reward
    distance_reward = curr_manhattan - next_manhattan
    
    # Check if agent reached goal
    agent_on_goal = (next_state.grid[next_pos[0].astype(jnp.int32), 
                                   next_pos[1].astype(jnp.int32), 0] == 6)
    goal_bonus = jax.lax.select(agent_on_goal, 5.0, 0.0)
    
    # Total reward (just distance shaping + goal bonus)
    total_reward = distance_reward + goal_bonus
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
